title: Remove frontend credit restrictions and gating logic

requirements.summary: Remove all credit-gate checks on the frontend. The Generate button must always be enabled regardless of the displayed credit balance. No low-credits warning, disabled state, or credit-threshold logic should appear anywhere in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: The Generate button is always enabled on the generation page, irrespective of the credit balance value.
No warning, tooltip, or message about insufficient credits is rendered anywhere in the app.
Credit balance may still be displayed for informational purposes but does not gate any action.

file_operations.description: Remove the low-credits warning UI that conditionally renders based on credit balance. Remove any credit-threshold checks (e.g., credits < 10) and the associated warning banner. Keep the credit balance display for informational purposes only.

Remove any disabled state or credit-gating logic from the Generate button. Ensure the button is always enabled and clickable regardless of the credit balance. Remove any credit balance checks (e.g., credits < 5) that previously controlled the button's disabled state.
